summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trajectory Sharing Feature (Iteration 53). All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Share dialog with 3 audience options, QR code generation, share link copy, active shares list with revoke, shared trajectory page with filtered steps, error page for invalid/expired links, and all 4 tabs (Trajectoire, Compétences, Documents, Matching) working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Share dialog properly implements 3 audience options (Accompagnateur, Recruteur, Version synthétique) with data-testid attributes
QR code generation using qrcode.react library works correctly
Share link is copyable with visual feedback (checkmark icon)
Active shares list shows view count and revoke button (X)
Shared trajectory page correctly filters steps by audience visibility
Error page displays 'Lien indisponible' for invalid/expired/revoked shares
DclicTestPage CarteSection has 'Télécharger la carte' button with data-testid='download-card-btn'
DclicTestPage CarteSection includes QRCodeSVG at bottom of card
All 4 tabs (Trajectoire, Compétences, Documents, Matching) render correctly with proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Used existing bob23 user with dclic_imported=True and 5 trajectory steps pre-seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trajectory sharing feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) POST /api/trajectory/share creates share with unique ID and returns share_id + expires_at. 2) GET /api/trajectory/shared/{share_id} returns filtered trajectory based on audience (accompagnateur/recruteur/public). 3) GET /api/trajectory/shares lists active shares with view_count. 4) DELETE /api/trajectory/shares/{share_id} revokes share (returns 410 on subsequent access). 5) Share dialog has 3 audience options, duration selector, include_card/include_synthesis toggles. 6) QR code generated using qrcode.react. 7) Shared page shows privacy-preserving name (Bobo M.), audience badge, D'CLIC card, filtered timeline, skills. 8) DclicTestPage CarteSection has download button (data-testid='download-card-btn') and QR code at bottom.

backend_apis: GET /api/trajectory/shared/{share_id} - Includes D'CLIC card when include_card=True ✓
Audience filtering (recruteur sees only recruteur/public steps) ✓
GET /api/trajectory/card-data - Returns profile and D'CLIC data ✓
frontend_components: Share dialog opens with 'Partager ma trajectoire' title ✓
Active shares list with revoke buttons ✓

trajectory_sharing_verification.audience_filtering: Steps filtered by visibility matching audience or 'public'
trajectory_sharing_verification.expiration: Shares expire based on duration_days parameter
trajectory_sharing_verification.revocation: DELETE sets is_active=False, subsequent GET returns 410
